title: VeloraOS 1.10.1 - Public Beta Chat Focus
releaseNotes: Makes Chat the only available customer-facing workspace during public beta.
Marks Models, Image Studio and Video Studio as coming soon while preserving their data and underlying code.
Adds first-setup selection and sequential download of one or more starter Chat models.
Preserves accounts, chats, settings, avatars, installed models, licensing, device identity and secure rollback updates.
